ToggleHostTooltip: Toggle using YouTube domain for localhost cache
WebServerUrlTooltip: The local URL that VRCVideoCacher listens on for video requests from VRChat/Resonite
YtdlpPathGlobalLabel: Use yt-dlp from PATH environment variable
YtdlpPathGlobalTooltip: Use a system-installed yt-dlp instead of the bundled one. Only enable if you have yt-dlp installed and available in your PATH
UseYouTubeCookiesTooltip: Use cookies from your browser to authenticate with YouTube. Fixes age-restricted and bot-detection issues
AutoUpdateUtilsTooltip: Automatically download the latest versions of yt-dlp, FFmpeg, and Deno on startup
AdditionalYtdlpArgsTooltip: Extra command-line arguments passed to yt-dlp when downloading videos
PreferredDubLanguageTooltip: Two-letter language code for dubbed audio. YouTube will use this language if available
CachePathTooltip: Folder where cached videos are stored. Leave empty to use the default location next to the executable
MaxCacheSizeLabel: Max Cache Size in GB (0 = unlimited)
MaxCacheSizeTooltip: Maximum total size for non-protected cached videos. Set to 0 for unlimited. Protected categories are not counted toward this limit
CacheYouTubeTooltip: Download and cache YouTube videos locally for faster playback
MaxYouTubeResolutionTooltip: Maximum video resolution to download. Higher resolutions use more disk space
MaxVideoLengthTooltip: Videos longer than this will not be cached. Prevents caching very long streams or movies
CachePyPyDanceTooltip: Download and cache PyPyDance videos locally
CacheVRDancingTooltip: Download and cache VRDancing videos locally
OnlyServeCachedTooltip: Only serve already cached content — no new downloads will be started
MaxConcurrentDownloadsTooltip: Number of videos to download simultaneously
EvictionProtectionDesc: Protected categories are exempt from the max cache size limit
ProtectYouTubeTooltip: YouTube videos will not be deleted when the cache exceeds the max size
ProtectPyPyDanceTooltip: PyPyDance videos will not be deleted when the cache exceeds the max size
ProtectVRDancingTooltip: VRDancing videos will not be deleted when the cache exceeds the max size
ProtectCustomDomainsTooltip: Custom domain videos will not be deleted when the cache exceeds the max size
EnableCustomDomainCachingTooltip: Cache videos from custom domains you specify below (e.g., self-hosted media servers)
DomainsToCacheDesc: Add domains to cache videos from (e.g., self-hosted media servers)
ClearCacheOnExitDesc: Automatically delete cached videos when VRCVideoCacher closes
ClearYouTubeCacheOnExitTooltip: Delete all cached YouTube videos when VRCVideoCacher shuts down
ClearPyPyDanceCacheOnExitTooltip: Delete all cached PyPyDance videos when VRCVideoCacher shuts down
ClearVRDancingCacheOnExitTooltip: Delete all cached VRDancing videos when VRCVideoCacher shuts down
CustomDomainsToClearOnExit: Custom Domains to Clear on Exit
CustomDomainsToClearOnExitDesc: Specific custom domains whose cached videos will be deleted on shutdown
PatchVRChatTooltip: Redirect VRChat video requests through VRCVideoCacher
PatchResoniteTooltip: Redirect Resonite video requests through VRCVideoCacher
AutoUpdateVRCVideoCacherTooltip: Automatically check for and install VRCVideoCacher updates on startup
StartWithVRCXTooltip: Automatically launch VRCVideoCacher when VRCX starts
StartWithSteamVRTooltip: Automatically launch VRCVideoCacher when SteamVR starts
AdvancedSettingsDesc: For power users only - modify at your own risk
YtdlpArgsOverride: yt-dlp Arguments Override (replaces Additional Args when set)
YtdlpArgsOverrideTooltip: Completely replaces the default yt-dlp arguments. When set, Additional Arguments are ignored. Use with caution
LeaveEmptyForAdditionalArgs: Leave empty to use Additional Arguments
PreCacheUrlsDesc: Videos to automatically download when VRCVideoCacher starts
BlockedUrlsDesc: URLs in this list will be blocked from playing and redirected to the Blocked URL Redirect below
BlockedUrlRedirectDesc: When a blocked URL is requested, the player will be redirected to this video instead
CookieSetupStep1Desc: Choose the browser you use to watch YouTube. The extension will export your YouTube cookies to VRCVideoCacher.
CookieSetupStep2Desc: Click the button below to open the extension store. Install the "VRCVideoCacher Cookies Exporter" extension.
CookieSetupStep3Desc: Open YouTube in your browser and make sure you're signed in. The extension will automatically send your cookies to VRCVideoCacher.
CookieSetupStep3Note: Note: You can uninstall the extension after cookies are received. If you browse YouTube again while logged in, cookies may be invalidated. Consider deleting YouTube cookies from your browser after setup, or keep the extension installed.
CookieSetupStep4Desc: Adding a hosts entry for localhost.youtube.com allows VRCVideoCacher to serve cached videos using the YouTube domain, which improves compatibility with VRChat's video player.
CookieSetupStep4Note: This requires administrator permission. You can skip this step and configure it later from the Dashboard.
CookieSetupCompleteDesc: YouTube cookies have been received. You should no longer see bot detection errors.
SettingsReset: Settings reset to last saved values.
